final_prompt.prompt:
Create an e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for LUMEA BEAUTY, a Japanese skincare brand targeting feminine beauty consumers, designed for conversion-focused beauty e-commerce.

Style/medium: clean modern e-commerce UI design with airy whitespace and editorial beauty photography sensibility
Composition: hero section with three-column layout — left text column (headline, subheadline, badges, CTAs), center model subject, right product display with floating stat cards; navigation bar at top with 5 links and CTA button
Subject: young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of moisturizing boost serum; two product items (dropper bottle + packaging box); 3 pill-shaped feature badges (敏感肌OK, 高保湿, 朝晩使える); 3 stat cards in floating white rounded rectangles with gold accents (満足度 96%, 美容成分 5種配合, 愛用者 12,000人突破); 3 benefit cards at bottom (うるおい, 透明感, 使いやすさ)
Scene/backdrop: soft gradient or pure white background with subtle floral accents featuring purple flowers, generous breathing room between elements
Lighting/mood: soft diffused lighting, the gentle warmth of morning skincare ritual
Color palette: soft pink as primary in conversation with clean white, purple floral accents as punctuation, gold accents on stat cards
Materials/textures: matte UI surfaces with subtle depth shadows, soft skin texture on model, glass dropper bottle with liquid serum
Text (verbatim): LUMEA BEAUTY (logo), 特徴 / 成分 / お客様の声 / 使い方 / FAQ (nav), 今すぐ試す (header CTA), 鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。(headline), 乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。(subheadline), 敏感肌OK / 高保湿 / 朝晩使える (badges), 美容成分をしっかり届ける / ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ / 続けやすいシンプルケア (bullets), 初回限定で試してみる > / 成分をチェック > (CTAs), 送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし (trust), 満足度 96% / 美容成分 5種配合 / 愛用者 12,000人突破 (stats), うるおい / 透明感 / 使いやすさ (benefits)
Constraints: all Japanese text legible, clear visual hierarchy from headline to CTA, feminine but not childish aesthetic, conversion-optimized layout with trust signals visible
Avoid: cluttered composition, harsh shadows, oversaturated pink, decorative noise that distracts from product and CTA

raw:
